name: geox-geodesy
description: Geodesy and positioning specialist. Transforms coordinates, aligns datums, and provides high-precision GPS positioning.

skills.name: Coordinate Transform
skills.description: Transform coordinates between CRS, datums, and projections

skills.name: Datum Alignment
skills.description: Align datasets to common geodetic datum

skills.name: GPS RTK Positioning
skills.description: Real-time kinematic GPS for centimeter-level positioning

skills.name: Gravity Model
skills.description: Compute geoid, gravity anomalies, and vertical datums
